hero.art_prompt: Sneha, an 18 year old Indian girl, happily surprised at a laptop showing an affordable BBA fee after comparing many colleges, bright hopeful mood, tidy home.

panels.narration: Sneha compared BBA fees, college after college.
panels.dialogue: Why is a degree so costly?
panels.img_prompt: Sneha, 18, at a desk comparing several high college-fee figures in a notebook, worried and overwhelmed, papers around her, modest home.

panels.narration: Most good options ran into several lakhs.
panels.dialogue: Is a real degree only for the rich?
panels.img_prompt: Sneha looking discouraged at a laptop showing an expensive fee, chin in hand, soft disappointed expression, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised BBA at ₹45,000 a year.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha's eyes widening with hope at a laptop showing a clear, affordable, recognised BBA fee, warm glow of relief.

panels.narration: She enrolled on a 0% EMI she could manage.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha smiling proudly holding a blank enrollment confirmation at home, calm and confident, warm hopeful light. No cash or money shown.

turn.title: Why This BBA Fee Is A Steal
points: Just ₹45,000/year for Finance, Marketing or HR (₹50,000 for Digital Marketing & Data Science + AI).
Pay the full fee upfront and get a flat 15% discount.
Or split it into easy monthly EMI at 0% interest, no extra cost.
Only ₹2,500 one-time registration + ₹3,000/year exam fee. No hidden charges.

testimonials.name: Sneha Pillai
testimonials.quote: I compared everywhere. A UGC-entitled BBA at ₹45,000 a year was the clear, honest choice.

testimonials.name: Arjun Das
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI meant no lump sum. I pay a small amount each month and my degree keeps going.

testimonials.name: Nisha Verma
testimonials.quote: We paid the year upfront and got a flat 15% off. A recognised degree at this price felt unreal.

testimonials.name: Vikram Rao
testimonials.quote: I finished my BBA without a single education loan. The monthly plan fit my budget perfectly.

facts.v: ₹45,000/year (₹50,000 for Digital Mktg & Data Sci + AI)
